roa.docketEntryComment: Defendant Change of Plea to "Guilty" or "No Contest" - Acknowledgement and Advisement of Defendant Pleading Guilty or No Contest
Order of the Court Finding Good Cause  to Continue due to  Public Health RE COVID-19 Pandemic
DEF ATC MOT TO RBW, FILED

/FTRRECORDED/CAL:TRIAL/CONTD PROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND  STAYED TO 09-29-21/X: BAIL SET AT $2500/DOPC/VD:TRIAL AND LAST DAY/

/CAL:PTC/LD:07-21-21/X:TRIAL DATE OF 07-08-21 IS CONFIRMED,/SB:2 HOUR/EMMOD:COURT ORDERS GPS DEVICE TURNED OFF FROM 07-09-21 AT 12:01 A,M,  UNTIL 07-09-21 AT 9:00 P,M,/ /CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE AND STATUS OF ELECTRONIC MONITORING/DOP/

/CAL:INSTRUCTION AND ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG//PD/987,2/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE ANDIS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/WS/WEAP/ /X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,//NTW/LDTR:07-21-21/SAORD/SA2:RONNAE MONIQUE WALKER/SAORD2/SA3:1508 27THAVENUE, APT, 31, OAKLAND, CA 94601/SAORD3/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE ON 07-06-21/DOP/CONTD:TRIAL ON 07-08-21/DOP/
/CAL:JURY TRIAL/FTRRECORDED/NP/DEF:IS ON 2 HR SB/LD:06-27-22/CONT/DEF:CONTINUES ON 2HR SB/
/CAL:DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO RECALL BENCH WARRANT/BWR:09-29-21/BWR1/OR/NTW//LDTR:06-27-22/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE & JURY TRIAL/SB:2 HOUR/
/CAL:STATUS OF ELECTRONIC MONITORING/LD:07-21-21 (GC COVID19)/DAWT/EMTERM//X:TRIAL DATE OF 08-19-21 IS CONFIRMED,/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DAWF/
/CAL:TRIAL/CAUSE1/X:WRITTEN ORDER FILED,/LDTR:07-21-21 (GC COVID19)/CONTD:STATUS OF EM/DOP/CONTD:TRIAL/SB:2 HOUR/
/CAL:PTC AND STATUS OF EM/LD:07-21-21/DAWT/X:TRIAL DATE OF 07-21-21 IS CONFIRMED,/
